summary: The video captures a snowy urban street with multiple vehicles and pedestrians. A white van is stopped on the right side of the road, partially obstructing the lane. A pedestrian wearing a red jacket crosses the street from right to left. The ego-vehicle approaches the van cautiously, maintaining a safe distance. Snow accumulates around the van, indicating recent snowfall.

events_timeline.event: A white van is parked on the right side of the road, partially blocking the lane.
A pedestrian wearing a red jacket crosses the street from right to left.
The ego-vehicle approaches the van cautiously, maintaining a safe distance.

uncertainties: The identity of the second pedestrian is unclear.
The exact nature of the van's obstruction is ambiguous.

risk_assessment.why: There is no direct collision or severe disruption observed between the ego-vehicle and the van. The situation appears controlled, with the ego-vehicle maintaining a safe distance.
